title: autobench.scoring.weights_adapted v1
description: Emitted when SICA scoring weights are adapted based on convergence metrics

weights.description: Renormalized SICA scoring weights used for this iteration

score_variance.description: Measured 2-sigma variance of score_delta over the lookback window

score_velocity.description: Mean signed score_delta over the lookback window (positive = improving)

reason.description: Why adaptation fired: plateau_detected | high_variance | early_iteration | budget_exhausted
